data.name: A Night Filled With the Sound of Rain
data.detailed_description:
One rainy night during your trip, you get lost and come across a bar. On a whim, you step inside. The sound of raindrops pattering against the ground is still faintly audible as your eyes land on a mysterious woman named Michiru. After sharing a few drinks, you get to know each other. Your conversation drifts from topic to topic, creating an unforgettable night as your surroundings melt away, leaving only you and your gorgeous companion.

Depending on the cocktail you order, the topic of conversation changes. Your talks with Michiru will broaden with the different options you pick. Would you like a pretty Sunset Blue or a dazzling Cosmo Zone? Follow the story to its end and see how this night will unfold in this atmospheric indie game.

Dynamic Conversations

The subject of your chats with Michiru depends on which cocktail you order. Try out all the drinks and learn everything you can about this mysterious woman.

Immaculate Vibes

Immerse yourself in a world made to soothe the soul with its lo-fi music and stunning pixel art.

data.short_description: A rainy night brings you to a small bar. When you step inside, you're met with soothing music. Your eyes land on a beautiful woman by the counter. Get to know Michiru and share your story with her. This unforgettable evening will be etched into your memory forever.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
